---

If the bot speaks for you, it’s not my fault. I’ve tried everything I can to fix it. If it still happens, it’s likely an issue with the system itself. I’m sorry for any confusion this causes.

✦ If anyone knows how to stop bots from speaking on behalf of the user, I would truly appreciate your guidance. It’s been a challenge, but I’m eager to learn how to prevent this from happening.

---

English is not my first language, so if you notice any typos or mistakes, please let me know! I’m open to corrections and I appreciate any help with improving. Thank you for understanding!
